creator: tingox@gmail.com
text:
The attached patch updates aMule from version 2.2.3 to version 2.2.4.

The updated port has been built and tested on RELENG_7 / amd64. It has also been built (with default options) by tinderbox on RELENG_7 / amd64.

Fix: Apply attached patch.

Patch attached with submission follows:
